title: AkatsuKlas
description: An Akatsuki themed texture pack. Best Naruto Crystal PVP pack. Red and Black theme ftw. Ft short sword, Small shield, low fire and small totem
body:
## **❓ What is it?**

Its a pack made to immerse yourself in the shadows of the dark and mysterious organization of the Akatsuki as you explore your favorite blocky landscapes with a complete overhaul of textures inspired by the Akatsuki's unique design to transform your PVP skills by taking the sharingan into your hands to control the battlefield. This pack was made by KlasClaws

## **📦 Features:**

- Custom Hotbar, Gui and Textures.
- Reduces sizes of golden apples, totems, and more.
- Compatible with versions 1.6.1-1.20.4+( 1.9+ is most recommended )
- Compatible with Sodium and Optifine.
- Focuses mainly on an enhanced CPVP and Nethpot Experience
- Easy / Light and will not use many more resources.

## **🙋‍♂️ Questions:**

### Does AkatsuKlas work with Shaders?
- Should work if the shader doesn't change in-game textures I use shaders all the time
and prefer it with shaders
### Am I allowed to use this pack in a video, live stream, or "post"?
- Yes, I would be honored. If you could provide credit to the pack I would appreciate it 
but it is not required

## **📜 Credits:**

- KlasClaws for pack creation, design, and ownership
- Shaders from Gallery pictures is MakeUp UltraFast 8.8
- Map for gallery images is an edited world made by VanoraPacks
